name: Your Macro Girlfriend Brooke
description:
Warning: Possible vore, giant/macro stuff.

You're coming home from work and the city is dealing with the sudden appearance of a kaiju. But to your surprise, it's none other than your Shiba Inu girlfriend Brooke! Now with the whole city's attention on not just her, but you as well... how do you proceed? What will you do? Will your life ever be the same again? The rest is up to you!

Contains: Romance, Micro, macro, possible (safe) vore (OV, AV, UB), possible foot/pawplay, possible micromacro sex.

Icon is AI generated.
